text: The SEGRO Board announces entry into a second joint venture with Pure Data Centres Group to deliver a data centre in Paris and reiterates its stance that Prologis' proposal is opportunistic, one-sided and inadequate

Board states that Glenstone's revised 71.4p offer effectively falls to 70.0p once the expected final 1.4p dividend is accounted for, leaving only a "negligible premium"and a 17% discount to NAV, and recommends shareholders take no action
ECP and KKR's PUSU deadline today
